faqs.question: What types of ants are most common in South Orange, NJ?
faqs.answer: South Orange properties commonly experience carpenter ants, pavement ants, odorous house ants, and acrobat ants. Carpenter ants are particularly concerning as they can damage the wooden structures of South Orange's many historic homes. Our technicians identify the specific species infesting your property to apply the most effective treatment method.

This includes a thorough inspection, targeted treatment, and follow-up visits if needed. We provide free estimates and transparent pricing with no hidden fees.
